data.body: S3 TDD RED confirmed: happy (config parse/defaults, valid-JWT->AccessToken via patched PyJWKClient) + held-out (wrong iss/aud/exp/nbf, alg:none, HS256-confusion, typ enforce/skip, symmetric-alg startup refusal x3, http/private-host SSRF reject + allow-opt-in + timeout=10, fetch-failure denies, unknown-kid cooldown exactly-1-fetch, rotated-key-after-cooldown, transport 200/401, manifest). Both RED (missing auth_jwt_* fields + JWKSTokenVerifier). Dispatching implementer.
